meta.audience: researchers, IRB members, and students seeking human subjects research ethics guidance
evidence_gaps: Full page structure and navigation not directly verified
Exact labels of links, downloads, and sections inferred
No analytics or user behavior data available

task_longlist.task_statement: Understand core principles of human subjects research

evidence.note: Page centers on ethical principles like respect, beneficence, justice

task_longlist.rationale: Primary purpose of page is to communicate foundational ethics principles.

evidence.element: Link to full report (HTML or PDF)
evidence.note: Users likely directed to full report text

task_longlist.rationale: Accessing the full report is a core user need with high importance.

task_longlist.task_statement: Download Belmont Report PDF for offline use

evidence.note: Typical government page provides downloadable version

task_longlist.rationale: Downloading is a common task for citation, training, and compliance.

task_longlist.task_statement: Find summary of Belmont Report principles

evidence.note: Page likely includes summarized principles before full text

task_longlist.rationale: Many users want a quick understanding rather than full report.

task_longlist.task_statement: Cite Belmont Report for research compliance

evidence.note: Used as authoritative citation in IRB and academic work

task_longlist.rationale: Critical for compliance and academic referencing.

task_longlist.task_statement: Learn history behind Belmont Report creation

evidence.note: Page typically includes background on commission and origins

task_longlist.rationale: Useful but not primary for most users.

task_longlist.task_statement: Locate specific sections within the report

evidence.note: Report likely structured with headings for navigation

task_longlist.rationale: Important for repeat users but less critical than access.

task_longlist.task_statement: Share Belmont Report with colleagues or students

evidence.note: Page designed for distribution and education

task_longlist.rationale: Common but not core compared to understanding content.

task_longlist.task_statement: Find related research ethics regulations and policies

evidence.note: Page likely links to broader OHRP policies

task_longlist.rationale: Adjacent need but not the main intent of this page.

task_longlist.task_statement: Print Belmont Report for training or review

evidence.note: Government pages typically support printing via PDF

task_longlist.rationale: Derivative of download task; lower independent importance.

recommended_survey.instructions: Select the 5 tasks that matter most to you when visiting this page.
